requirement_topic.en: Restricted Hazardous Substances — No EU-Style Horizontal RoHS Regime in Argentina
requirement_topic.zh: 限用有害物质——阿根廷无欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度
requirement_topic.zht: 限用有害物質——阿根廷無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度

summary.en: Argentina does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime that restricts a defined list of hazardous substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, and the four phthalates) in electrical and electronic equipment as a precondition for market placement. There is no general mandatory RoHS Declaration of Conformity or homogeneous-material substance-restriction certificate required for LED luminaires to enter the Argentine market. Hazardous-substance management in Argentina is addressed through other instruments (general chemical, hazardous-waste, and environmental rules) rather than a product-level restricted-substances directive bundled into the conformity mark. Stated plainly: there is no Argentine RoHS gate equivalent to the EU's for LED luminaires as of this review. Verify there is no sector-specific or provincial substance restriction applicable to the specific product before assuming none applies.
summary.zh: 阿根廷不实行欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，不会将限制电气电子设备中既定有害物质清单（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 及四项邻苯二甲酸酯）作为市场准入的前提条件。LED 灯具进入阿根廷市场无需一般性强制 RoHS 符合性声明或均质材料物质限制证书。阿根廷的有害物质管理通过其他制度（一般化学品、危险废物及环境规则）处理，而非将产品级限用物质指令捆绑进合格标志。直言之：截至本次审阅，阿根廷不存在相当于欧盟的 LED 灯具 RoHS 关卡。在认定不适用之前，请核实是否存在适用于具体产品的行业特定或省级物质限制。
summary.zht: 阿根廷不實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，不會將限制電氣電子設備中既定有害物質清單（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 及四項鄰苯二甲酸酯）作為市場准入的前提條件。LED 燈具進入阿根廷市場無需一般性強制 RoHS 符合性聲明或均質材料物質限制證書。阿根廷的有害物質管理通過其他制度（一般化學品、危險廢物及環境規則）處理，而非將產品級限用物質指令捆綁進合格標誌。直言之：截至本次審閱，阿根廷不存在相當於歐盟的 LED 燈具 RoHS 關卡。在認定不適用之前，請核實是否存在適用於具體產品的行業特定或省級物質限制。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS-equivalent product directive in Argentina (no mandatory restricted-substances DoC for EEE market placement as of this review)
General Argentine environmental / hazardous-substance and hazardous-waste framework (e.g., Ley 24.051 de Residuos Peligrosos) — not a product-level RoHS substitute

summary.en: China has GB/T 26572-2011 (concentration limits for restricted substances in EEE), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same thresholds as EU RoHS, and China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014) requiring a hazardous-substance disclosure label on EEE sold in China. China therefore has a defined restricted-substances framework with mandatory disclosure labelling, whereas Argentina has no equivalent product-level RoHS gate.
summary.zh: 中国有 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品限用物质限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同；以及中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014），要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识。因此中国设有既定的限用物质框架及强制披露标签，而阿根廷无相当于产品级 RoHS 关卡。
summary.zht: 中國有 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品限用物質限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同；以及中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014），要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識。因此中國設有既定的限用物質框架及強制披露標籤，而阿根廷無相當於產品級 RoHS 關卡。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Concentration limits for restricted substances in EEE (China, original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label

gap.en: This is a reverse gap relative to the EU comparison: Argentina has no horizontal RoHS product gate, so a Chinese LED luminaire does not need a RoHS-type restricted-substances DoC or the EU's four-phthalate testing to enter Argentina. China itself has the more developed framework here (GB/T 26572 for 6 substances plus the China RoHS 2 disclosure label), which a CN-compliant product already satisfies. The practical implication for the exporter is that no additional Argentine RoHS step is generally required for market placement; the binding Argentine gates remain the S-safety mark, the energy-efficiency label, ENACOM (if wireless), and Spanish marking. Caution: this absence is stated honestly and may change; the exporter should still confirm there is no applicable sector-specific or provincial restriction, and note that if the product is later re-exported from Argentina into a RoHS market, RoHS would apply there.
gap.zh: 相对于欧盟对照，这是一个反向差距：阿根廷无横向 RoHS 产品关卡，故中国 LED 灯具进入阿根廷无需 RoHS 式限用物质符合性声明或欧盟的四项邻苯二甲酸酯检测。在此方面中国本身框架更完善（GB/T 26572 涵盖 6 项物质加中国 RoHS 2 披露标识），符合中国标准的产品已满足。对出口商的实务含义是：阿根廷市场准入一般无需额外 RoHS 步骤；阿根廷的约束性关卡仍为 S 安全标志、能效标签、ENACOM（若无线）及西班牙语标识。注意：此项缺失为如实陈述且可能变化；出口商仍应确认无适用的行业特定或省级限制，并注意若产品日后从阿根廷再出口至 RoHS 市场，则该市场适用 RoHS。
gap.zht: 相對於歐盟對照，這是一個反向差距：阿根廷無橫向 RoHS 產品關卡，故中國 LED 燈具進入阿根廷無需 RoHS 式限用物質符合性聲明或歐盟的四項鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測。在此方面中國本身框架更完善（GB/T 26572 涵蓋 6 項物質加中國 RoHS 2 披露標識），符合中國標準的產品已滿足。對出口商的實務含義是：阿根廷市場准入一般無需額外 RoHS 步驟；阿根廷的約束性關卡仍為 S 安全標誌、能效標籤、ENACOM（若無線）及西班牙語標識。注意：此項缺失為如實陳述且可能變化；出口商仍應確認無適用的行業特定或省級限制，並注意若產品日後從阿根廷再出口至 RoHS 市場，則該市場適用 RoHS。

mandatory_status.target: Not required — Argentina has no EU-style horizontal RoHS product gate; no mandatory restricted-substances DoC for LED luminaire market placement as of this review
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — GB/T 26572-2011 covers 6 substances; China RoHS 2 disclosure label (SJ/T 11364-2014) required for the CN market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina has no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime restricting hazardous substances in EEE as a precondition for market placement, and no mandatory RoHS DoC is required for LED luminaires as of this review. China actually has the more developed substance framework here (GB/T 26572 plus China RoHS 2 disclosure label). The binding Argentine gates remain the S-safety mark, the energy-efficiency label, ENACOM (if wireless), and Spanish marking. Confirm there is no sector-specific or provincial substance restriction applicable to the specific product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷无欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，不会将限制 EEE 中有害物质作为市场准入前提，截至本次审阅 LED 灯具无需强制 RoHS 符合性声明。在此方面中国实际框架更完善（GB/T 26572 加中国 RoHS 2 披露标识）。阿根廷的约束性关卡仍为 S 安全标志、能效标签、ENACOM（若无线）及西班牙语标识。请确认无适用于具体产品的行业特定或省级物质限制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，不會將限制 EEE 中有害物質作為市場准入前提，截至本次審閱 LED 燈具無需強制 RoHS 符合性聲明。在此方面中國實際框架更完善（GB/T 26572 加中國 RoHS 2 披露標識）。阿根廷的約束性關卡仍為 S 安全標誌、能效標籤、ENACOM（若無線）及西班牙語標識。請確認無適用於具體產品的行業特定或省級物質限制。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical / SVHC Supply-Chain Notification — No REACH-Equivalent in Argentina
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品/SVHC 供应链通报——阿根廷无 REACH 对应制度
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品/SVHC 供應鏈通報——阿根廷無 REACH 對應制度

summary.en: Argentina does not have a REACH-equivalent regime requiring proactive supply-chain notification of Substances of Very High Concern (SVHC) above 0.1% w/w in articles, and there is no Argentine equivalent of the ECHA Candidate List or the SCIP database for LED luminaires. Chemical control in Argentina is handled through general chemical-substance, hazardous-substance, and hazardous-waste regulation rather than an articles-in-products SVHC communication duty. For LED luminaire market placement, there is therefore no mandatory ongoing SVHC screening or B2B/consumer notification obligation comparable to REACH Article 33. Stated plainly: this EU-style horizontal chemical-notification obligation does not exist in Argentina as of this review.
summary.zh: 阿根廷没有 REACH 对应制度，不要求对物品中浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）的高度关注物质（SVHC）进行主动供应链通报，也不存在相当于 ECHA 候选清单或 SCIP 数据库的阿根廷制度（针对 LED 灯具）。阿根廷的化学品控制通过一般化学物质、危险物质及危险废物法规处理，而非产品中物质的 SVHC 通报义务。因此 LED 灯具市场准入无相当于 REACH 第 33 条的强制性持续 SVHC 筛查或 B2B/消费者通报义务。直言之：截至本次审阅，阿根廷不存在此欧盟式横向化学品通报义务。
summary.zht: 阿根廷沒有 REACH 對應制度，不要求對物品中濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）的高度關注物質（SVHC）進行主動供應鏈通報，也不存在相當於 ECHA 候選清單或 SCIP 數據庫的阿根廷制度（針對 LED 燈具）。阿根廷的化學品控制通過一般化學物質、危險物質及危險廢物法規處理，而非產品中物質的 SVHC 通報義務。因此 LED 燈具市場准入無相當於 REACH 第 33 條的強制性持續 SVHC 篩查或 B2B/消費者通報義務。直言之：截至本次審閱，阿根廷不存在此歐盟式橫向化學品通報義務。

standards_or_laws: No REACH-equivalent SVHC articles-notification regime in Argentina (no Candidate List / SCIP equivalent for LED luminaires as of this review)
General Argentine chemical / hazardous-substance and hazardous-waste framework (e.g., Ley 24.051) — not an SVHC articles-communication substitute

summary.en: China likewise has no direct equivalent of the REACH Article 33 articles-in-products SVHC notification duty. The closest Chinese instruments are the Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (MEE Order No. 12, 2020) and GB 30981-2020 (classification and labelling of chemicals), which govern chemical substances rather than imposing a proactive SVHC-in-articles communication obligation. So neither China nor Argentina imposes a REACH-style articles notification duty.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH 第 33 条产品中物质 SVHC 通报义务的制度。最接近的中国制度为《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》（生态环境部令第 12 号，2020 年）及 GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签），其规范化学物质而非施加产品中 SVHC 的主动通报义务。因此中国与阿根廷均不施加 REACH 式产品通报义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH 第 33 條產品中物質 SVHC 通報義務的制度。最接近的中國制度為《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》（生態環境部令第 12 號，2020 年）及 GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤），其規範化學物質而非施加產品中 SVHC 的主動通報義務。因此中國與阿根廷均不施加 REACH 式產品通報義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Neither Argentina nor China imposes a REACH Article 33-style proactive SVHC articles-notification duty, so for the China-to-Argentina lane this is a non-gap: a Chinese LED luminaire faces no Argentine SVHC supply-chain notification, ECHA Candidate List screening, or SCIP-equivalent registration requirement for market placement. The exporter should not assume an EU-style chemical obligation applies in Argentina. Caution: this is the position as of this review and could change; and if goods are onward-exported from Argentina into the EU/UK, REACH/UK-REACH obligations would attach in those markets. Within Argentina, chemical risk is managed by general environmental/hazardous-substance law, not a product-level SVHC communication duty.
gap.zh: 阿根廷与中国均不施加 REACH 第 33 条式主动 SVHC 产品通报义务，故就中国—阿根廷通道而言这是非差距：中国 LED 灯具进入阿根廷市场无需 SVHC 供应链通报、ECHA 候选清单筛查或 SCIP 式注册。出口商不应假定阿根廷适用欧盟式化学品义务。注意：此为本次审阅时的情形且可能变化；若货物自阿根廷再出口至欧盟/英国，则该市场适用 REACH/UK-REACH 义务。在阿根廷境内，化学品风险由一般环境/危险物质法管理，而非产品级 SVHC 通报义务。
gap.zht: 阿根廷與中國均不施加 REACH 第 33 條式主動 SVHC 產品通報義務，故就中國—阿根廷通道而言這是非差距：中國 LED 燈具進入阿根廷市場無需 SVHC 供應鏈通報、ECHA 候選清單篩查或 SCIP 式註冊。出口商不應假定阿根廷適用歐盟式化學品義務。注意：此為本次審閱時的情形且可能變化；若貨物自阿根廷再出口至歐盟/英國，則該市場適用 REACH/UK-REACH 義務。在阿根廷境內，化學品風險由一般環境/危險物質法管理，而非產品級 SVHC 通報義務。

mandatory_status.target: Not required — Argentina has no REACH-equivalent SVHC articles-notification regime for LED luminaires as of this review
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China has no REACH Article 33-style SVHC articles-notification duty either

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina has no REACH-equivalent SVHC articles-notification regime, ECHA Candidate List, or SCIP-equivalent database for LED luminaires, so no such obligation applies to the China-to-Argentina lane. China likewise has no Article 33-style duty. The exporter should not assume an EU-style chemical-notification step is required in Argentina, but should note REACH/UK-REACH would apply if goods are onward-exported into those markets. Position stated as of this review and subject to change.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷无相当于 REACH 的 SVHC 产品通报制度、ECHA 候选清单或 SCIP 式数据库（针对 LED 灯具），故中国—阿根廷通道无此义务。中国同样无第 33 条式义务。出口商不应假定阿根廷需要欧盟式化学品通报步骤，但应注意若货物再出口至该等市场则适用 REACH/UK-REACH。本情形为本次审阅时所述且可能变化。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷無相當於 REACH 的 SVHC 產品通報制度、ECHA 候選清單或 SCIP 式數據庫（針對 LED 燈具），故中國—阿根廷通道無此義務。中國同樣無第 33 條式義務。出口商不應假定阿根廷需要歐盟式化學品通報步驟，但應注意若貨物再出口至該等市場則適用 REACH/UK-REACH。本情形為本次審閱時所述且可能變化。

requirement_topic.en: Overall Conformity Process and Technical File vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 整体合格评定流程与技术文件 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 整體合格評定流程與技術文件 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Placing an LED luminaire on the Argentine market is a multi-gate, third-party-certified process rather than a single self-declaration: (1) obtain mandatory electrical-safety certification and the S-safety mark via IRAM or another recognized certifier (Resolucion 169/2018 et seq.), testing to IRAM-adopted IEC 60598 / 62560 / 61347-2-13; (2) obtain and affix the mandatory energy-efficiency label (efficacy class) via the applicable IRAM method; (3) for smart/wireless products, obtain ENACOM type approval (homologacion); (4) provide Spanish-language marking, warnings, and instructions; (5) act through an in-country importer of record holding a CUIT, who handles registration and customs clearance. Unlike the EU CE self-declaration route, the core safety gate is mandatory third-party certification. There is no horizontal RoHS or REACH gate to add. Verify the current certifier list, certification modality, and in-scope product categories with official sources before shipment.
summary.zh: 将 LED 灯具投放阿根廷市场是多关卡、第三方认证的流程，而非单一自我声明：（1）通过 IRAM 或其他认可认证机构取得强制性电气安全认证及 S 安全标志（Resolucion 169/2018 及后续规定），按 IRAM 采用的 IEC 60598／62560／61347-2-13 检测；（2）通过适用 IRAM 方法取得并贴附强制性能效标签（光效等级）；（3）对智能/无线产品，取得 ENACOM 型号核准（homologacion）；（4）提供西班牙语标识、警示及说明书；（5）通过持 CUIT 的境内进口记录方办理注册及清关。与欧盟 CE 自我声明路径不同，核心安全关卡为强制性第三方认证。无须叠加横向 RoHS 或 REACH 关卡。出货前请依官方来源核实现行认证机构清单、认证方式及适用产品类别。
summary.zht: 將 LED 燈具投放阿根廷市場是多關卡、第三方認證的流程，而非單一自我聲明：（1）通過 IRAM 或其他認可認證機構取得強制性電氣安全認證及 S 安全標誌（Resolucion 169/2018 及後續規定），按 IRAM 採用的 IEC 60598／62560／61347-2-13 檢測；（2）通過適用 IRAM 方法取得並貼附強制性能效標籤（光效等級）；（3）對智能/無線產品，取得 ENACOM 型號核准（homologacion）；（4）提供西班牙語標識、警示及說明書；（5）通過持 CUIT 的境內進口記錄方辦理註冊及清關。與歐盟 CE 自我聲明路徑不同，核心安全關卡為強制性第三方認證。無須疊加橫向 RoHS 或 REACH 關卡。出貨前請依官方來源核實現行認證機構清單、認證方式及適用產品類別。

standards_or_laws: Resolucion 169/2018 (Secretaria de Comercio) — S-mark electrical-safety certification process
Argentine energy-efficiency labelling regime (Secretaria de Energia)
ENACOM homologacion (for wireless products); in-country importer of record with CUIT

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory gate is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and certified/tested by bodies such as CQC, under CNCA-C10-01 for in-scope luminaires; the China Energy Label (CEL) covers efficiency, the China RoHS 2 disclosure label covers substances, and SRRC covers wireless. Both China and Argentina therefore use mandatory third-party certification for safety, but the schemes, certifiers, marks (CCC vs S-mark), and labels are entirely separate with no mutual recognition.
summary.zh: 在中国，主要强制关卡为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理、由 CQC 等机构认证/检测，依据 CNCA-C10-01 适用于范围内灯具；中国能效标识（CEL）涵盖能效，中国 RoHS 2 披露标识涵盖物质，SRRC 涵盖无线。因此中国与阿根廷均对安全采用强制性第三方认证，但方案、认证机构、标志（CCC 与 S 标志）及标签完全独立，互不认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，主要強制關卡為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理、由 CQC 等機構認證/檢測，依據 CNCA-C10-01 適用於範圍內燈具；中國能效標識（CEL）涵蓋能效，中國 RoHS 2 披露標識涵蓋物質，SRRC 涵蓋無線。因此中國與阿根廷均對安全採用強制性第三方認證，但方案、認證機構、標誌（CCC 與 S 標誌）及標籤完全獨立，互不認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
China Energy Label (CEL); China RoHS 2 disclosure label; SRRC type approval (wireless)

gap.en: Both regimes use mandatory third-party certification for safety, but the China-to-Argentina lane requires running the full Argentine multi-gate process in parallel with no reuse of Chinese certificates: a fresh S-mark certification (IRAM-adopted IEC), the Argentine energy-efficiency label, ENACOM homologacion for wireless, Spanish marking, and an importer of record with a CUIT. Compared with the EU lane, Argentina differs in two notable ways: (a) the core safety gate is mandatory third-party certification (like China's CCC) rather than EU-style self-declaration; and (b) there is no horizontal RoHS or REACH gate to satisfy, so the substance-related EU steps (four-phthalate testing, SVHC tracking, SCIP) do not apply. The dominant practical burden is the third-party S-mark certification, the local energy label, and the CUIT-based importer/registration logistics. Confirm the current certifier list and in-scope categories with official sources.
gap.zh: 两套制度对安全均采用强制性第三方认证，但中国—阿根廷通道须并行完成完整的阿根廷多关卡流程，且不可重用中国证书：重新取得 S 标志认证（IRAM 采用的 IEC）、阿根廷能效标签、无线产品 ENACOM homologacion、西班牙语标识，以及持 CUIT 的进口记录方。与欧盟通道相比，阿根廷有两点显著不同：（a）核心安全关卡为强制性第三方认证（类似中国 CCC），而非欧盟式自我声明；（b）无须满足横向 RoHS 或 REACH 关卡，故与物质相关的欧盟步骤（四项邻苯二甲酸酯检测、SVHC 跟踪、SCIP）不适用。主要实务负担为第三方 S 标志认证、本地能效标签及基于 CUIT 的进口商/注册物流。请依官方来源核实现行认证机构清单及适用类别。
gap.zht: 兩套制度對安全均採用強制性第三方認證，但中國—阿根廷通道須並行完成完整的阿根廷多關卡流程，且不可重用中國證書：重新取得 S 標誌認證（IRAM 採用的 IEC）、阿根廷能效標籤、無線產品 ENACOM homologacion、西班牙語標識，以及持 CUIT 的進口記錄方。與歐盟通道相比，阿根廷有兩點顯著不同：（a）核心安全關卡為強制性第三方認證（類似中國 CCC），而非歐盟式自我聲明；（b）無須滿足橫向 RoHS 或 REACH 關卡，故與物質相關的歐盟步驟（四項鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測、SVHC 跟蹤、SCIP）不適用。主要實務負擔為第三方 S 標誌認證、本地能效標籤及基於 CUIT 的進口商/註冊物流。請依官方來源核實現行認證機構清單及適用類別。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — S-mark third-party safety certification + energy-efficiency label + (if wireless) ENACOM homologacion + Spanish marking + in-country importer of record (CUIT) required before market placement; no horizontal RoHS/REACH gate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (CNCA-C10-01) + CEL + China RoHS 2 disclosure label + (if wireless) SRRC required for the CN market

source.publisher: Secretaria de Comercio / Ministerio de Economia (Argentina)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentine market placement is a multi-gate, third-party-certified process: mandatory S-mark electrical-safety certification (IRAM-adopted IEC), the energy-efficiency label, ENACOM homologacion for wireless products, Spanish marking, and an in-country importer of record with a CUIT. Chinese CCC/CEL/SRRC do not transfer — the Argentine gates must be satisfied separately. Unlike the EU, the core safety gate is mandatory third-party certification (similar in form to CCC) and there is no horizontal RoHS or REACH gate to add. Confirm the current certifier list, modality, and in-scope categories with official sources before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷市场准入是多关卡、第三方认证流程：强制性 S 标志电气安全认证（IRAM 采用的 IEC）、能效标签、无线产品 ENACOM homologacion、西班牙语标识，及持 CUIT 的境内进口记录方。中国 CCC/CEL/SRRC 不可转用——阿根廷各关卡须分别满足。与欧盟不同，核心安全关卡为强制性第三方认证（形式类似 CCC），且无须叠加横向 RoHS 或 REACH 关卡。出货前请依官方来源核实现行认证机构清单、方式及适用类别。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷市場准入是多關卡、第三方認證流程：強制性 S 標誌電氣安全認證（IRAM 採用的 IEC）、能效標籤、無線產品 ENACOM homologacion、西班牙語標識，及持 CUIT 的境內進口記錄方。中國 CCC/CEL/SRRC 不可轉用——阿根廷各關卡須分別滿足。與歐盟不同，核心安全關卡為強制性第三方認證（形式類似 CCC），且無須疊加橫向 RoHS 或 REACH 關卡。出貨前請依官方來源核實現行認證機構清單、方式及適用類別。
